---
pagetitle: "Masthead · Rabat Review of Books"
title-block-banner: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="rrb-container">

<div class="listing-page-title">
  <div class="eyebrow">◆ The Review</div>
  <h1>Masthead</h1>
  <div class="dek">A small magazine, written and edited by one hand.</div>
</div>

<div style="max-width: 720px; margin: 0 auto; text-align: center;">

  <p style="font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif; font-style: italic; font-size: 1.3em; color: #0d3b66; line-height: 1.6; margin: 2.5em auto 2em;">
    The <em>Rabat Review of Books</em> is written, edited, and published by a single person, from a single city, for anyone willing to read slowly.
  </p>

  <div class="rrb-mast-role">
    <div class="rrb-mast-title">Editor &amp; Writer</div>
    <div class="rrb-mast-names">Mehdi Khribch</div>
  </div>
  <div class="rrb-mast-role">
    <div class="rrb-mast-title">Publisher</div>
    <div class="rrb-mast-names">Mehdi Khribch</div>
  </div>
  <div class="rrb-mast-role">
    <div class="rrb-mast-title">Founded</div>
    <div class="rrb-mast-names">Rabat, 2026</div>
  </div>
  <div class="rrb-mast-role">
    <div class="rrb-mast-title">Correspondence</div>
    <div class="rrb-mast-names"><a href="mailto:editors@rabatreview.org">editors@rabatreview.org</a></div>
  </div>

  <p style="font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif; font-style: italic; color: #5a7a95; margin-top: 3em; font-size: 1.05em;">
    "A magazine is a conversation with the best strangers."
  </p>

</div>
</div>

<style>
.rrb-mast-role {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.4fr;
  gap: 1.6em;
  padding: 0.9em 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #d9cfb8;
  align-items: baseline;
  max-width: 560px;
  margin: 0 auto;
}
.rrb-mast-title {
  font-family: "Cormorant Garamond", Georgia, serif;
  font-style: italic;
  font-size: 1em;
  font-weight: 500;
  color: #5a7a95;
  text-align: right;
}
.rrb-mast-names {
  font-family: "Cormorant Garamond", Georgia, serif;
  font-size: 1.2em;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #0d3b66;
  text-align: left;
}
</style>
```
